sizing_rule.note: Divide account into N equal shares; reduce position by fixed number of shares per week (e.g., 5 shares/week). This is a systematic exit/averaging-out rule, not a standard entry sizing method. Formula: Position Size = (1 Share Value) × (Shares to Exit Per Week)

source_rule_text: Divide your account into equal shares and average out of positions by reducing exposure by a fixed number of shares per week.
